name: Supabase Emerald
description: Premium developer interface using rich dark slate backdrops, emerald green status highlights, and clean card partitions.
promptBlock: Style: Supabase. Colors: background is dark charcoal (#1c1c1c), cards are slightly lighter slate (#1f1f1f), and highlights/primary actions are Supabase green (#3ecf8e). Font is clean Inter. Cards have 6px border-radius and thin borders (#2c2c2c). Create developers layouts with database table styles, green accent badges, and high-quality dark UI grids.
